title: URL Shortener - Advanced Link Management System
description: A full-stack URL shortener with analytics, password-protected links, and custom short URLs. Designed with backend-focused architecture including JWT authentication and scalable API handling.

title: JobDekho API - Job Management Backend
description: A RESTful API for managing job postings with secure authentication, middleware architecture, and structured CRUD operations for scalable backend systems.

title: Instagram Clone - Full Stack Social Platform
description: A MERN stack social media application with features like authentication, post creation, likes, follow/unfollow, and media uploads using Multer and ImageKit.

title: Figma Clone - Web Design Editor
description: A frontend-based design editor enabling users to create, drag, resize, and manage elements with a properties panel, simulating a simplified Figma-like experience.
